ast.target: 先前的攀爬者留下了大型金属杆，攀爬者可以使用它们来辅助攀登。如果使用岩钉的玩家角色在攀爬行动掷骰中失败，他们可以标记1点压力，而不是将倒计时推进。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: A lively tavern that serves as the social hub for its town.
ast.target: 一家热闹的酒馆，作为其所在城镇的社交中心。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: A PC can perform one time for the guests by making a Presence Roll. On a success, they earn 1d4 handfuls of gold (2d4 if they critically succeed). On a failure, they mark a Stress.
ast.target: 一个玩家角色可以通过进行一次存在感掷骰来为客人们表演一次。若成功，他们获得1d4把金币（若大成功则为2d4）。若失败，他们标记1点压力。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: Reveal a stranger concealing their identity, lurking in a shaded booth.
ast.target: 揭示一个隐藏身份、潜伏在阴暗隔间里的陌生人。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: Introduce a significant NPC who wants to hire the party for something or who relates to a PC's background.
ast.target: 介绍一位重要的非玩家角色，他想雇佣队伍做某事，或者与某个玩家角色的背景有关。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: A small town on the outskirts of a nation or region, close to a dungeon, tombs, or other adventuring destinations.
ast.target: 一个位于国家或地区边缘的小镇，靠近地牢、墓穴或其他冒险目的地。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: Another adventuring party is here, seeking the same treasure or leads as the PCs.
ast.target: 另一支冒险队伍也在此地，与玩家角色们寻求着相同的宝藏或线索。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: The PCs witness as agents of a local crime boss shake down a general goods store.
ast.target: 玩家角色们目睹了当地犯罪头目的手下正在敲诈一家杂货店。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: A swift-moving river without a bridge crossing, deep enough to sweep away most people.
ast.target: 一条湍急的河流，没有桥梁可供穿越，水深足以卷走大多数人。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: Crossing the river requires the party to complete a Progress Countdown (4). A PC who rolls a failure with Fear is immediately targeted by the "Undertow" action without requiring a Fear to be spent on the feature.
ast.target: 穿越河流需要队伍完成一个进度倒计时（4）。任何掷骰失败并带有恐惧的玩家角色，将立即被“暗流”行动锁定，无需为该特性消耗恐惧。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: Spend a Fear to catch a PC in the undertow. They must make an Agility Reaction Roll. On a failure, they take 1d6+1 physical damage and are moved a Close distance down the river, becoming Vulnerable until they get out of the river. On a success, they must mark a Stress.
ast.target: 消耗一点恐惧，将一名玩家角色卷入暗流。该角色必须进行一次敏捷反应检定。若失败，他们受到1d6+1点物理伤害，并被向下游移动一个近距离，直到离开河流前处于易伤状态。若成功，他们必须标记一点压力。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: Spend a Fear to summon a Glass Snake within Close range of a chosen PC. The Snake appears in or near the river and immediately takes the spotlight to use their "Spinning Serpent" action.
ast.target: 消耗一点恐惧，在选定玩家角色的近距离范围内召唤一条玻璃蛇。该蛇出现在河流中或附近，并立即获得聚光灯，使用其“旋转巨蛇”行动。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: Once per scene, each PC can mark a Stress to turn a result with Fear into a result with Hope.
ast.target: 每场场景一次，每名玩家角色可以标记一点压力，将一个带有恐惧的结果转变为带有希望的结果。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: An abandoned city populated by the restless spirits of eras past.
ast.target: 一座被过往时代不安灵魂占据的废弃城市。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: Adversaries who appear here are of a ghostly form. They have resistance to physical damage and can mark a Stress to move up to Close range through solid objects.
ast.target: 在此出现的敌人都呈幽灵形态。他们对物理伤害有抗性，并可以标记一点压力，穿过固体物体移动至近距离范围。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: Stony peaks that pierce the clouds, with a twisting path winding its way up and over through many switchbacks.
ast.target: 刺破云霄的石峰，一条蜿蜒的小路盘旋而上，穿过许多急转弯。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: When the PCs enter the raptors' hunting grounds, two Giant Eagles appear at Very Far range of a chosen PC, identifying the PCs as likely prey.
ast.target: 当玩家角色进入猛禽的猎场时，两只巨鹰会出现在选定玩家角色的极远距离处，将玩家角色们视为可能的猎物。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: Thick indigo ash fills the air around a towering moss-covered tree that burns eternally with flames a sickly shade of blue.
ast.target: 浓密的靛蓝色灰烬弥漫在一棵高耸的、覆盖着苔藓的树木周围，这棵树永恒地燃烧着病态的蓝色火焰。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: When a PC makes a Spellcast Roll, they must roll two Fear Dice and take the higher result.
ast.target: 当玩家角色进行施法检定时，他们必须掷两颗恐惧骰，并取较高的结果。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: Warped animals wreathed in indigo flame trample through a point of your choice. All targets within Close range of that point must make an Agility Reaction Roll. Targets who fail take 3d12+3 physical damage. Targets who succeed take half damage instead.
ast.target: 被靛蓝色火焰包裹的扭曲动物践踏过你选择的一个点。该点近距离范围内的所有目标必须进行一次敏捷反应检定。失败的目标受到3d12+3点物理伤害。成功的目标则受到一半伤害。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: An active siege with an attacking force fighting to gain entry to a fortified castle.
ast.target: 一场激烈的攻城战，进攻方正奋力攻入一座设防的城堡。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: A PC can find or recall a secret way into the castle with a successful Instinct or Knowledge Roll.
ast.target: 玩家角色可以通过一次成功的本能或知识检定，找到或回忆起进入城堡的秘密通道。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: A massive combat between two large groups of armed combatants.
ast.target: 两支大型武装战斗人员之间的一场大规模战斗。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: The attacking force raises the stakes by lighting a fire, stealing a valuable asset, kidnapping an important person, or killing the populace.
ast.target: 进攻方通过纵火、窃取贵重资产、绑架重要人物或屠杀平民来提高赌注。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: Spend a Fear as a mage from one side uses large-scale destructive magic. Pick a point on the battlefield within Very Far range of the mage. All targets within Close range of that point must make an Agility Reaction Roll. Targets who fail take 3d12+8 magic damage and must mark a Stress.
ast.target: 消耗一点恐惧，让一方的一名法师使用大规模毁灭性魔法。在法师的极远距离内选择一个点。该点近距离范围内的所有目标必须进行一次敏捷反应检定。失败的目标受到3d12+8点魔法伤害，并必须标记一点压力。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: An otherworldly space where the laws of reality are unstable and dangerous.
ast.target: 一个异界空间，现实法则在此不稳定且危险。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: On a failure, they take 4d10 direct magic damage. On a success, they must mark a Stress.
ast.target: 若失败，他们受到4d10点直接魔法伤害。若成功，他们必须标记一点压力。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: On a result with Fear, you can ask the PC to describe which of their fears the Chaos Realm evokes as a vision of reality unmakes and reconstitutes itself to the PC. The PC loses a Hope. If it is their last Hope, you gain a Fear.
ast.target: 当结果带有恐惧时，你可以要求玩家角色描述当现实崩解又重组时，混乱领域唤起了他们哪一种恐惧作为幻象。该玩家角色失去一点希望。如果这是他们最后一点希望，你获得一点恐惧。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: When a PC critically succeeds, they can spend 2 Hope to refresh an ability normally limited by uses (such as once per rest, once per session).
ast.target: 当玩家角色大成功时，他们可以消耗2点希望来刷新一个通常受使用次数限制的能力（例如每休息一次、每场一次）。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: Spend 2 Fear to summon 1d4+2 Fallen Shock Troops that appear within Close range of the Usurper to assist their divine siege. Immediately spotlight the Shock Troops to use a "Group Attack" action.
ast.target: 消耗2点恐惧，召唤1d4+2名堕落突击兵，他们出现在篡夺者的近距离范围内，协助其神圣攻城。立即让突击兵获得聚光灯，使用一次“群体攻击”行动。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: On any failure with Fear against the Usurper, the PC must mark 1d4 Stress from the backlash of magical power.
ast.target: 任何针对篡夺者的、带有恐惧的失败，玩家角色都必须因魔法力量的反噬而标记1d4点压力。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: A dusty crypt with a library, twisting corridors, and abundant sarcophagi; spattered with the blood of ill-fated invaders.
ast.target: 一个布满灰尘的地穴，内有图书馆、曲折的走廊和众多石棺；溅满了不幸入侵者的鲜血。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: A feature or action that clears HP requires spending a Hope to use. If it already costs Hope, a PC must spend an additional Hope.
ast.target: 任何清除生命值的特性或行动都需要消耗一点希望才能使用。如果它本身就需要消耗希望，则玩家角色必须额外消耗一点希望。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: A PC can investigate the library and laboratory and make a Knowledge Roll to learn information related to arcana, local history, and the Necromancer's plans.
ast.target: 玩家角色可以调查图书馆和实验室，并进行一次知识检定，以了解与奥秘、当地历史和死灵法师计划相关的信息。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: Once per scene, roll a d4. Each undead within Far range of the Necromancer can clear HP and Stress equal to the result rolled. The undead can choose how that total number is divided between HP and Stress.
ast.target: 每场场景一次，掷一个d4。死灵法师远距离范围内的每个亡灵可以清除等于该结果数值的生命值和压力。亡灵可以选择如何在生命值和压力之间分配这个总数。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: Spend a Fear to summon 1d6 Rotted Zombies, two Perfected Zombies, or a Zombie Legion, who appear at Close range of a chosen PC.
ast.target: 消耗一点恐惧，召唤1d6具腐烂僵尸、两具完美僵尸或一支僵尸军团，他们出现在选定玩家角色的近距离范围内。

ast.name: name
ast.source: The Best Muscle Money Can Buy
ast.target: 金钱能买到的最强打手

ast.name: name
ast.source: I Have Never Known Defeat (Phase Change)
ast.target: 我从未尝过败绩（阶段转换）

ast.name: name
ast.source: What's the Talk of the Town?

ast.name: name
ast.source: It'd Be a Shame If Something Happened to Your Store
ast.target: 你的店要是出点什么事就太可惜了

ast.name: name
ast.target: 错误的地点，错误的时间

ast.name: name
ast.source: Adrift on a Sea of Steel

ast.name: name
ast.source: Everything You Are This Place Will Take From You

ast.name: text
ast.source: Overrides are stored in plugin state and apply to every instance of this card. The library entry is untouched.
ast.target: 覆盖存储在插件状态中，并应用于此卡牌的每个实例。库条目保持不变。
